title: jasminum pipolyi
intro: Jasminum polyanthum, also known as the many-flowered jasmine, is a flowering plant in the jasmine family, native to China and Taiwan. The plant's flowers, leaves, and roots are used in traditional Chinese medicine and are known for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Jasminum polyanthum are attributed to its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in perfumery and aromatherapy due to its fragrant flowers.
